summary: Completed comprehensive testing of RBAC (Role-Based Access Control) feature - All 25 backend API tests passed (100%), all frontend features working correctly including Auth page with login/register modes, Google Auth button, password guideline, Admin dashboard with Users tab and role management.
passed_tests: POST /api/auth/register creates a new user with role 'user'
GET /api/auth/me returns user info with role
POST /api/shops requires contributor or admin role
PUT /api/shops/{id} - contributor can only edit own shops (403 for others)
DELETE /api/shops/{id} - contributor can only delete own shops (403 for others)
Auth page (/auth) renders with login form, Google Auth button, register toggle
Auth page registration form shows name field and password guideline
Switching between login and register modes works
Navbar Sign In button links to /auth page
Admin dashboard accessible to admin users
Admin dashboard shows Users tab for admins with role dropdown
Admin dashboard shows Articles, Admins, Messages tabs for admins only
User registration creates account and auto-logs in
User menu shows name, email, and Sign Out option
Login error message displays correctly for wrong password
Short password validation works via HTML5 minLength attribute
seed_data_creation: Test users created during testing with TEST_ prefix for identification
context_for_next_testing_agent: RBAC feature fully implemented and tested. Backend has registration, login, admin login, user management (list users, change role) endpoints. Frontend has AuthPage with login/register modes, Google Auth integration, password guideline. Admin dashboard has Users tab with role filter buttons and role select dropdowns. Roles: guest (no login), user (rate/comment), contributor (create/edit/delete own shops), admin (full access). All 4 roles properly enforced on backend endpoints.
